# DairyFlow — Complete Platform Reference

> This is the extended LLM-readable reference for DairyFlow, India's leading AI-powered dairy delivery management platform. For a shorter summary, see /llms.txt

---

## Company Overview

DairyFlow is a SaaS platform purpose-built for the Indian dairy delivery industry. It digitizes the entire milk delivery supply chain — from farm/dairy to doorstep — replacing manual registers, phone-based orders, and paper billing with an intelligent, mobile-first platform.

**Founded**: 2024
**Headquarters**: India
**Industry**: AgriTech / Dairy Technology / Last-Mile Delivery
**Website**: https://dairyflow.mywebz.in

---

## The Problem

India's dairy delivery industry — worth over ₹8 lakh crore — is largely unorganized:
- 80% of dairy businesses use paper registers for subscriptions
- Average delivery route inefficiency: 35-40% extra distance traveled
- Billing disputes cause 15-20% customer churn annually
- No real-time visibility for customers on delivery status
- Seasonal demand fluctuations managed by guesswork

**DairyFlow solves this** with AI-powered route optimization, digital subscription management, real-time GPS tracking, automated billing, and data-driven analytics.

---

## Platform Architecture

### Technology Stack
- Frontend: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Progressive Web App (PWA)
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Edge Functions, Storage)
- Maps: Google Maps API for route optimization and GPS tracking
- AI/ML: Route optimization algorithms, demand prediction
- Notifications: Push notifications via service workers
- Languages: i18n with English, Hindi, Marathi

### Deployment
- Hosted on Lovable Cloud
- CDN-delivered static assets
- Edge functions for serverless backend logic
- Real-time subscriptions via Supabase Realtime

---

## Detailed Feature Descriptions

### 1. AI-Powered Route Optimization
DairyFlow's route optimization engine analyzes delivery locations, traffic patterns, road networks, and time windows to generate the most efficient delivery sequence. Results: 20-30% reduction in fuel costs, 15-25% faster delivery completion, fewer missed time windows.

**Keywords**: milk delivery route optimization, AI route planning, fuel cost reduction dairy, smart delivery routing India

### 2. Subscription Management
Flexible milk subscription system supporting:
- Daily, alternate day, weekly, and custom schedules
- Multiple products per subscription (cow milk, buffalo milk, paneer, curd, ghee)
- Skip, pause, resume with one tap
- Automatic billing based on actual deliveries
- Festival/holiday schedule adjustments

**Keywords**: milk subscription management, doodh subscription app, dairy subscription software, flexible milk delivery plans

### 3. Real-Time GPS Delivery Tracking
Live delivery tracking powered by Google Maps:
- Customer sees delivery boy's live location on map
- ETA updates every 30 seconds
- Push notification on delivery start, nearby, and completion
- Delivery photo proof
- Delivery timestamp logging

**Keywords**: milk delivery tracking, real-time doodh delivery, GPS milk delivery India, live delivery status

### 4. Customer Loyalty & Referral Program
Multi-tier loyalty system:
- Points earned per delivery received
- Referral bonuses for inviting new customers
- Tier progression: Bronze → Silver → Gold → Platinum
- Milestone badges and achievement rewards
- Birthday/anniversary bonus points
- Leaderboard for top referrers
- Redeemable rewards catalog

**Keywords**: dairy loyalty program, milk delivery rewards, customer retention dairy, referral program milk delivery

### 5. Multi-Role Dashboard System

#### Dairy Owner Dashboard
- Revenue analytics with trend charts
- Customer management (add, edit, view history)
- Delivery boy management and performance tracking
- Product catalog management
- Subscription overview and billing
- Inventory and stock management
- Route assignment and optimization

#### Delivery Boy Dashboard
- Today's delivery list with swipeable cards
- GPS-optimized route view
- One-tap delivery completion
- Earnings tracker (daily, weekly, monthly)
- Performance stats and ratings
- Profile management

#### Customer Dashboard
- Active subscription overview
- Delivery tracking with live map
- Order history and billing
- Loyalty points balance and history
- Referral sharing
- Profile and address management
- Delivery rating system

#### Super Admin Dashboard
- Multi-dairy management
- User management across all roles
- System-wide analytics
- Platform settings and configuration
- Data export and reporting

### 6. Inventory & Cold Chain Management
- Real-time stock level monitoring
- Low stock alerts and reorder triggers
- Temperature monitoring integration points
- Batch tracking and expiry management
- Waste reduction analytics

**Keywords**: dairy cold chain management, milk inventory software, dairy stock management, cold storage dairy delivery

### 7. Automated Billing & Payments
- Auto-generated invoices based on deliveries
- Digital payment integration
- Payment history and receipts
- Outstanding balance tracking
- Monthly billing cycle management

### 8. Analytics & Business Intelligence
- Revenue trends (daily, weekly, monthly, yearly)
- Delivery performance metrics
- Customer acquisition and churn analytics
- Product-wise demand analysis
- Delivery boy performance comparison
- Route efficiency scoring
- Seasonal demand forecasting

### 9. Multi-Language Support
Full platform localization:
- English: Complete UI, notifications, reports
- Hindi (हिंदी): Full translation including dairy-specific terminology
- Marathi (मराठी): Full translation for Maharashtra dairy market
- Seamless language switching without page reload

### 10. Progressive Web App (PWA)
- Installable on Android and iOS home screen
- Offline-capable with service worker caching
- Push notifications for delivery updates
- App-like experience without app store dependency
- Automatic updates

---

## Pricing Details

### Free Trial
- 14 days, full feature access
- No credit card required
- Up to 20 customers
- Email support

### Starter Plan — ₹999/month
- Up to 100 customers
- 3 delivery boys
- Basic analytics
- Email support
- Route optimization
- Subscription management

### Professional Plan — ₹2,499/month
- Up to 500 customers
- 10 delivery boys
- Advanced analytics & BI
- Priority support
- Loyalty program
- Custom branding
- API access

### Enterprise Plan — Custom Pricing
- Unlimited customers and delivery boys
- Dedicated account manager
- Custom integrations
- SLA guarantee
- On-premise deployment option
- White-label capability
- Training and onboarding

---

## Industry Context & Statistics

- India is the world's largest milk producer (~230 million tonnes annually)
- Indian dairy market size: ₹8+ lakh crore (>$100 billion USD)
- 80 million+ dairy farmers in India
- Doorstep milk delivery market growing at 15-20% CAGR
- Urban consumers increasingly prefer subscription-based fresh milk delivery
- Digital adoption in dairy sector below 5% — massive growth opportunity

---

## Use Cases

### Small Dairy (50-100 customers)
A local dairy owner managing 2-3 delivery boys, serving a neighborhood. DairyFlow replaces the paper register, automates billing, and provides customers with delivery tracking.

### Mid-Size Dairy (100-500 customers)
Growing dairy business with 5-10 delivery boys across multiple areas. Route optimization becomes critical for profitability. Analytics help identify growth opportunities.

### Large Dairy Enterprise (500+ customers)
Multi-location dairy operation with fleet management needs. Enterprise features including white-labeling, API integrations, and dedicated support.

### Customer (End Consumer)
A family subscribing to daily milk delivery. Uses DairyFlow to manage subscription, track deliveries, skip vacation days, and earn loyalty rewards.

---

## Vernacular / Regional Search Terms

### Hindi (हिंदी)
- दूध डिलीवरी ऐप (Milk Delivery App)
- डेयरी प्रबंधन सॉफ्टवेयर (Dairy Management Software)
- दूध सब्सक्रिप्शन (Milk Subscription)
- दूध का बिजनेस कैसे शुरू करें (How to Start Milk Business)
- दूध वितरण ऐप (Milk Distribution App)
- ऑनलाइन दूध ऑर्डर (Online Milk Order)
- दूध की होम डिलीवरी (Milk Home Delivery)
- गाय का दूध डिलीवरी (Cow Milk Delivery)
- भैंस का दूध डिलीवरी (Buffalo Milk Delivery)

### Marathi (मराठी)
- दूध वितरण अॅप (Milk Distribution App)
- डेअरी व्यवस्थापन सॉफ्टवेअर (Dairy Management Software)
- दूध सदस्यता (Milk Subscription)
- दूध व्यवसाय (Milk Business)
- दूध डिलिव्हरी सेवा (Milk Delivery Service)
- ऑनलाइन दूध ऑर्डर (Online Milk Order)
- घरपोच दूध (Doorstep Milk)

---

## Competitive Positioning

DairyFlow is the only platform that combines:
1. **Dairy-specific** workflows (not generic delivery)
2. **AI route optimization** (not basic sequencing)
3. **Full subscription lifecycle** management
4. **Regional language support** (Hindi + Marathi)
5. **Loyalty and referral** programs built-in
6. **Cold chain awareness** in the delivery process
7. **Progressive Web App** with offline capability

---

## Contact & Support

- **Website**: https://dairyflow.mywebz.in
- **Email**: support@dairyflow.app
- **Languages**: English, Hindi, Marathi
- **Support Hours**: Mon-Sat, 9 AM - 6 PM IST
